mapper.select: SELECT c.content_id, c.title, c.main_image_path, c.start_at, c.end_at FROM content_like cl JOIN content c ON cl.content_id = c.content_id WHERE cl.user_id = #{user_id} LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT r.*, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply a WHERE a.gno = r.reply_id AND a.reply_status = 1 ) AS answer_count FROM reply r WHERE r.user_id = #{user_id} AND r.reply_status = 0 ORDER BY r.reply_id DESC LIMIT #{startIdx}, 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND reply_status = 0
SELECT * FROM reply WHERE reply_id = #{reply_id} AND reply_status = 0
SELECT * FROM reply WHERE gno = #{reply_id} AND reply_status = 1 ORDER BY reply_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT a.creply_id, a.title, a.created_at, a.content_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_reply b WHERE b.gno = a.creply_id AND b.nested = 1) as answer_count FROM content_reply a WHERE a.user_id = #{user_id} AND a.nested = 0 ORDER BY a.creply_id DESC LIMIT #{startIdx}, 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_reply WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND nested = 0
SELECT * FROM content_reply WHERE gno = #{creply_id} ORDER BY nested ASC, creply_id ASC
SELECT * FROM content_reply WHERE gno = #{creply_id} AND nested = 1 ORDER BY creply_id DESC LIMIT 1
